refurbishment_work_scope_rows.basis: Required before corrosion, phase, material and operating checks can be finalised.
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.notes: Quantity is a work driver for cost/LCA scoping, not a contractor estimate. Conservative remaining life is non-positive; review before reuse.

refurbishment_work_scope_rows.work_item_name: Confirm water limit and dew-point basis
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.basis: Dry CO2 specification and water-dew-point margin control corrosion risk.
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.notes: Quantity is a work driver for cost/LCA scoping, not a contractor estimate. Conservative remaining life is non-positive; review before reuse.

refurbishment_work_scope_rows.basis: Pipeline preparation is needed where corrosion, debris or dry-CO2 readiness remains uncertain.
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.notes: Quantity is a work driver for cost/LCA scoping, not a contractor estimate. Conservative remaining life is non-positive; review before reuse.

refurbishment_work_scope_rows.basis: Inspection evidence is needed before reuse can be treated as a serious option.
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.notes: Quantity is a work driver for cost/LCA scoping, not a contractor estimate. Conservative remaining life is non-positive; review before reuse.

refurbishment_work_scope_rows.basis: Material evidence is needed for pipe, weld and fracture checks.
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.notes: Quantity is a work driver for cost/LCA scoping, not a contractor estimate. Conservative remaining life is non-positive; review before reuse.

refurbishment_work_scope_rows.basis: Valves, seals, coatings and equipment exposed to CO2 service need compatibility review.
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.notes: Quantity is a work driver for cost/LCA scoping, not a contractor estimate. Conservative remaining life is non-positive; review before reuse.

refurbishment_work_scope_rows.basis: Dense-phase or high-pressure CO2 reuse needs fracture and decompression evidence.
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.notes: Quantity is a work driver for cost/LCA scoping, not a contractor estimate. Conservative remaining life is non-positive; review before reuse.

refurbishment_work_scope_rows.basis: Wall-thickness uncertainty must be reduced before detailed reuse decisions.
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.notes: Quantity is a work driver for cost/LCA scoping, not a contractor estimate. Conservative remaining life is non-positive; review before reuse.

refurbishment_work_scope_rows.work_item_name: CO2 leak detection, isolation and IMR plan
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.basis: Reuse needs an operating integrity, leak detection and repair plan before operation.
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.notes: Quantity is a work driver for cost/LCA scoping, not a contractor estimate. Conservative remaining life is non-positive; review before reuse.

refurbishment_work_scope_rows.basis: Calculated as new-build pipe steel mass multiplied by the gate-recommended refurbishment steel fraction.
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.notes: Uses refurbishment fraction 0.0500; replace with inspection-based repair quantities when available. Conservative remaining life is non-positive; review before reuse.

refurbishment_work_scope_rows.basis: Aggregate LCA package for inspection, cleaning, drying, repair and recommissioning until detailed process factors are split.
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.notes: Use this as the current LCA package row. Individual work items show what the package should later be split into. Conservative remaining life is non-positive; review before reuse.

inputs.notes: Goldeneye pipeline length

inputs.notes: Standard inner diameter shown in dissertation app screenshot

inputs.notes: Pale Blue Dot / Acorn condition used in case study

inputs.name: outlet_pressure_psia
inputs.notes: Pale Blue Dot / Acorn condition used in case study

inputs.name: transport_temperature_c
inputs.notes: Pale Blue Dot / Acorn condition used in case study

inputs.name: molecular_weight_co2_g_per_mol
inputs.notes: Input shown in app screenshot

inputs.name: compressibility_factor_z
inputs.notes: Reported app output

inputs.name: viscosity_micro_pa_s
inputs.notes: Reported app output

inputs.name: fanning_friction_factor
inputs.notes: Reported app output

inputs.name: required_project_flow_mtpa
inputs.notes: Maximum Acorn requirement used in case study

outputs.name: capacity_suitable
outputs.value: yes

assumptions.name: capacity_factor
assumptions.notes: Used to convert project flow requirement to design flow

warnings.message: CO2 properties are currently supplied by the benchmark assumptions; CoolProp/REFPROP validation is still required.

trace.name: average_pressure
trace.formula: (2/3) * (P_in + P_out - P_in * P_out / (P_in + P_out))

trace.name: capacity
trace.formula: sqrt((pi^2 * D^5 * MW * (P_in^2 - P_out^2)) / (64 * f * Z * R * T * L))
trace.notes: This reproduces the dissertation/poster equation form.

trace.name: required_design_flow
trace.formula: required_project_flow_mtpa / capacity_factor

trace.name: reynolds_number
trace.formula: 4 * mass_flow / (pi * viscosity * inner_diameter)

warnings.message: Corrosion model is a screening dry-CO2 risk check. A final model needs stream composition, water specification, operating envelope, inspection evidence, and specialist review.

trace.name: corrosion_rate_range
trace.formula: low/base/high corrosion rates are read from scenario assumptions
trace.notes: Used for remaining-life uncertainty.

trace.name: dry_co2_risk
trace.formula: high if water content exceeds limit or dew point margin is negative; medium if water evidence is missing or high corrosion rate is material; otherwise low
trace.notes: Screening rule, not a detailed corrosion prediction model.

outputs.name: corrosion_risk_level
outputs.value: medium

assumptions.name: future_co2_corrosion_rate_mm_per_year
assumptions.notes: Representative dense-phase CO2 corrosion rate used for future lifetime

assumptions.name: nominal_wall_thickness_uncertainty_fraction
assumptions.notes: Goldeneye wall thickness has conflicting reported values; use sensitivity range until source is verified

assumptions.name: minimum_wall_thickness_uncertainty_fraction
assumptions.notes: Minimum wall basis is uncertain and Barlow sanity check suggests a higher value may be needed

assumptions.name: historical_wall_loss_uncertainty_fraction
assumptions.notes: Historical corrosion loss is uncertain without inspection records

warnings.message: Integrity result is a screening estimate only; inspection records, material grade checks, defects, and requalification are still needed.
Conservative uncertainty case gives zero remaining life; wall-thickness basis needs targeted evidence.

trace.name: historical_wall_loss
trace.formula: reported_historical_wall_loss_mm, if available; otherwise historical_corrosion_rate_mm_per_year * historical_corrosion_years

trace.name: current_wall_thickness
trace.formula: nominal_wall_thickness_mm - historical_wall_loss_mm

trace.name: available_wall_thickness
trace.formula: current_wall_thickness_mm - minimum_wall_thickness_mm

trace.name: remaining_life
trace.formula: available_wall_thickness_mm / future_co2_corrosion_rate_mm_per_year

trace.name: remaining_life_uncertainty
trace.formula: conservative life = low wall / high corrosion; optimistic life = high wall / low corrosion
trace.notes: Screening uncertainty band for limited or conflicting wall evidence.

inputs.name: cost_material_usd_2025
inputs.notes: Parker model cost component

inputs.notes: Parker model cost component

inputs.notes: Parker model cost component

inputs.name: cost_misc_usd_2025
inputs.notes: Parker model cost component

inputs.name: cost_surge_tank_usd_2025
inputs.notes: Additional CO2 pipeline component

inputs.name: cost_control_system_usd_2025
inputs.notes: Additional CO2 pipeline component

inputs.name: cost_booster_station_usd_2025
inputs.notes: No booster station in Goldeneye case

inputs.name: contingency_fraction
inputs.notes: Project contingency factor

inputs.name: reported_total_capex_usd_2025
inputs.notes: Reported avoided new-build CAPEX

outputs.name: netl_cost_validation_status
outputs.value: not_supplied

assumptions.name: contingency_fraction
assumptions.notes: Project contingency factor

warnings.message: No NETL CO2_T_COM reference total is supplied for this scenario, so cost is internally checked but not externally validated.

trace.name: cost_subtotal
trace.formula: sum(material, labor, ROW damages, misc, surge tank, control system, booster station)

trace.name: contingency
trace.formula: contingency_fraction * cost_subtotal_usd_2025

trace.name: total_cost
trace.formula: cost_subtotal_usd_2025 + cost_contingency_usd_2025

trace.name: netl_cost_comparison
trace.formula: cost_total_usd_2025 - netl_reference_total_capex_usd_2025
trace.notes: Runs only when a like-for-like NETL CO2_T_COM reference is supplied.

warnings.message: Repurposing gate is a screening/requalification checklist. It is not final engineering approval.

Repurposing evidence gaps: inner_diameter_in quality is assumed_or_standard; target_co2_phase quality is assumed; co2_water_content_ppmv quality is assumed; co2_water_spec_limit_ppmv quality is assumed; water_dew_point_margin_c quality is assumed; co2_composition_known is no; material_certificates_available is unknown; fracture_toughness_basis quality is assumed; ili_mfl_available is unknown; component_compatibility_screened is no.

trace.name: repurposing_phase_screen
trace.formula: use target_co2_phase when stated; otherwise compare average pressure with CO2 critical pressure as a screening flag
trace.notes: Screening logic only; detailed phase behaviour needs validated EOS/mixture modelling. Cites REF_OSTBY_TORBERGSEN_RONEID_LEINUM_2022_CO2_REQUALIFICATION and REF_TORBERGSEN_LEINUM_RONEID_2025_GAS_PHASE_CO2_REQUALIFICATION.

trace.name: repurposing_evidence_score
trace.formula: start at 100; subtract weighted penalties for missing, assumed, unknown or weak requalification evidence
trace.notes: Cites REF_BURKINSHAW_GALLON_CARVELL_HUSSAIN_2024_HYDROGEN_DATA_EVIDENCE for data confidence discipline.

trace.name: repurposing_work_scope
trace.formula: convert evidence gaps and CO2-service risks into named work items for cost and LCA
trace.notes: Cites REF_KUMAR_LOWERY_PASSUCCI_2025_ENI_LIVERPOOL_BAY_IMR, REF_DALONZO_BUSCO_ELVIRA_CHERUBINI_2025_CO2_IMR, REF_YUSOF_AZIZ_2025_PETRONAS_DENSE_PHASE_CO2_REPURPOSING and REF_KASS_ET_AL_2023_MATERIAL_COMPATIBILITY.

outputs.name: refurbishment_work_scope_status
outputs.value: ready_for_screening

outputs.name: refurbishment_work_scope_row_ids
outputs.value: confirm_co2_composition_and_impurities; confirm_water_limit_and_dew_point; cleaning_drying_and_debris_assessment; ili_mfl_or_equivalent_inspection; material_certificates_or_testing; component_compatibility_review; fracture_and_decompression_screen; wall_thickness_verification; co2_leak_detection_isolation_and_imr_plan; replacement_or_refurbishment_steel; refurbishment_activity_package

warnings.message: Refurbishment work-scope quantities are screening drivers. They are not contractor method statements, vendor quotes, or final LCA factors.

trace.name: gate_items_to_work_scope_rows
trace.formula: map repurposing_work_scope_items to quantity drivers; add replacement steel and aggregate refurbishment activity package
trace.notes: Rows cite requalification, IMR, dense-phase, data quality and material compatibility source IDs. They are designed to feed cost and LCA modules.

outputs.name: pre_lca_decision
outputs.value: marginal

outputs.name: pre_lca_confidence
outputs.value: medium

outputs.name: pre_lca_reason_summary
outputs.value: Move to LCA only as a sensitivity case until assumptions are checked.

outputs.name: pre_lca_reasons
outputs.value: Capacity passes: 9.13 MtCO2/year versus 5.88 MtCO2/year required.; Integrity passes at screening level: 77.94 years remaining life and 7.79 mm available wall.; Cost screen is positive: benchmark avoided new-build CAPEX is $228,500,811.; Some important values are assumed or sensitivity inputs: capacity_factor, co2_composition_known, co2_water_content_ppmv, co2_water_spec_limit_ppmv, component_compatibility_screened, contingency_fraction, fracture_toughness_basis, future_co2_corrosion_rate_high_mm_per_year, future_co2_corrosion_rate_low_mm_per_year, future_co2_corrosion_rate_mm_per_year, historical_corrosion_years, historical_wall_loss_uncertainty_fraction, ili_mfl_available, inner_diameter_in, material_certificates_available, minimum_wall_thickness_uncertainty_fraction, nominal_wall_thickness_uncertainty_fraction, section_replacement_fraction, target_co2_phase, water_dew_point_margin_c.; Upstream modules still contain validation warnings.; Repurposing gate is marginal: Promising only as a screening case, but important evidence is missing..

outputs.name: pre_lca_next_data
outputs.value: verify wall thickness and inspection records; validate CO2 density, viscosity, compressibility, and phase behaviour; complete the repurposing gate evidence checklist; compare cost with NETL CO2_T_COM or another external benchmark; define itemised reuse modification cost before detailed LCA

warnings.message: Pipeline is technically promising, but should not move to detailed LCA without checking key assumptions.

trace.name: pre_lca_gate
trace.formula: fail if any upstream module fails; insufficient_data if key outputs are missing; marginal if outputs pass but key assumptions, repurposing-gate gaps, or validation warnings remain; otherwise pass
trace.notes: This is a screening gate, not an engineering approval decision.

trace.name: pipeline_steel_mass
trace.formula: pi * (OD^2 - ID^2) / 4 * length * steel_density

trace.name: lca_proxy
trace.formula: new-build proxy = steel mass * steel factor + length * construction factor; reuse proxy = refurbishment steel * steel factor + length * refurbishment factor
trace.notes: Screening proxy to be replaced by Brightway/openLCA ecoinvent calculation. The refurbishment fraction may be increased by the repurposing gate when evidence gaps suggest additional validation or replacement work.

refurbishment_work_scope_rows.basis: Required before corrosion, phase, material and operating checks can be finalised.
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.notes: Quantity is a work driver for cost/LCA scoping, not a contractor estimate. Conservative remaining life is non-positive; review before reuse.

refurbishment_work_scope_rows.work_item_name: Confirm water limit and dew-point basis
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.basis: Dry CO2 specification and water-dew-point margin control corrosion risk.
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.notes: Quantity is a work driver for cost/LCA scoping, not a contractor estimate. Conservative remaining life is non-positive; review before reuse.

refurbishment_work_scope_rows.basis: Pipeline preparation is needed where corrosion, debris or dry-CO2 readiness remains uncertain.
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.notes: Quantity is a work driver for cost/LCA scoping, not a contractor estimate. Conservative remaining life is non-positive; review before reuse.

refurbishment_work_scope_rows.basis: Inspection evidence is needed before reuse can be treated as a serious option.
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.notes: Quantity is a work driver for cost/LCA scoping, not a contractor estimate. Conservative remaining life is non-positive; review before reuse.

refurbishment_work_scope_rows.basis: Material evidence is needed for pipe, weld and fracture checks.
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.notes: Quantity is a work driver for cost/LCA scoping, not a contractor estimate. Conservative remaining life is non-positive; review before reuse.

refurbishment_work_scope_rows.basis: Valves, seals, coatings and equipment exposed to CO2 service need compatibility review.
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.notes: Quantity is a work driver for cost/LCA scoping, not a contractor estimate. Conservative remaining life is non-positive; review before reuse.

refurbishment_work_scope_rows.basis: Dense-phase or high-pressure CO2 reuse needs fracture and decompression evidence.
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.notes: Quantity is a work driver for cost/LCA scoping, not a contractor estimate. Conservative remaining life is non-positive; review before reuse.

refurbishment_work_scope_rows.basis: Wall-thickness uncertainty must be reduced before detailed reuse decisions.
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.notes: Quantity is a work driver for cost/LCA scoping, not a contractor estimate. Conservative remaining life is non-positive; review before reuse.

refurbishment_work_scope_rows.work_item_name: CO2 leak detection, isolation and IMR plan
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.basis: Reuse needs an operating integrity, leak detection and repair plan before operation.
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.notes: Quantity is a work driver for cost/LCA scoping, not a contractor estimate. Conservative remaining life is non-positive; review before reuse.

refurbishment_work_scope_rows.basis: Calculated as new-build pipe steel mass multiplied by the gate-recommended refurbishment steel fraction.
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.notes: Uses refurbishment fraction 0.0500; replace with inspection-based repair quantities when available. Conservative remaining life is non-positive; review before reuse.

refurbishment_work_scope_rows.basis: Aggregate LCA package for inspection, cleaning, drying, repair and recommissioning until detailed process factors are split.
refurbishment_work_scope_rows.notes: Use this as the current LCA package row. Individual work items show what the package should later be split into. Conservative remaining life is non-positive; review before reuse.

inputs.notes: Input shown in app screenshot

inputs.notes: Reported app output

inputs.notes: Reported app output

inputs.notes: Reported app output

inputs.name: required_project_flow_mtpa
inputs.notes: Initial Acorn requirement used in poster

outputs.name: capacity_suitable
outputs.value: yes

assumptions.name: capacity_factor
assumptions.notes: Used to convert project flow requirement to design flow

warnings.message: CO2 properties are currently supplied by the benchmark assumptions; CoolProp/REFPROP validation is still required.

trace.name: average_pressure
trace.formula: (2/3) * (P_in + P_out - P_in * P_out / (P_in + P_out))

trace.name: capacity
trace.formula: sqrt((pi^2 * D^5 * MW * (P_in^2 - P_out^2)) / (64 * f * Z * R * T * L))
trace.notes: This reproduces the dissertation/poster equation form.

trace.name: required_design_flow
trace.formula: required_project_flow_mtpa / capacity_factor

trace.name: reynolds_number
trace.formula: 4 * mass_flow / (pi * viscosity * inner_diameter)

trace.name: corrosion_rate_range
trace.formula: low/base/high corrosion rates are read from scenario assumptions
trace.notes: Used for remaining-life uncertainty.

trace.name: dry_co2_risk
trace.formula: high if water content exceeds limit or dew point margin is negative; medium if water evidence is missing or high corrosion rate is material; otherwise low
trace.notes: Screening rule, not a detailed corrosion prediction model.

assumptions.notes: Input shown in poster app screenshot

assumptions.name: nominal_wall_thickness_uncertainty_fraction
assumptions.notes: Goldeneye wall thickness has conflicting reported values; use sensitivity range until source is verified

assumptions.name: minimum_wall_thickness_uncertainty_fraction
assumptions.notes: Minimum wall basis is uncertain and Barlow sanity check suggests a higher value may be needed

assumptions.name: historical_wall_loss_uncertainty_fraction
assumptions.notes: Historical corrosion loss is uncertain without inspection records

warnings.message: Integrity result is a screening estimate only; inspection records, material grade checks, defects, and requalification are still needed.
Conservative uncertainty case gives zero remaining life; wall-thickness basis needs targeted evidence.

trace.name: historical_wall_loss
trace.formula: reported_historical_wall_loss_mm, if available; otherwise historical_corrosion_rate_mm_per_year * historical_corrosion_years

trace.name: current_wall_thickness
trace.formula: nominal_wall_thickness_mm - historical_wall_loss_mm

trace.name: available_wall_thickness
trace.formula: current_wall_thickness_mm - minimum_wall_thickness_mm

trace.name: remaining_life
trace.formula: available_wall_thickness_mm / future_co2_corrosion_rate_mm_per_year

trace.name: remaining_life_uncertainty
trace.formula: conservative life = low wall / high corrosion; optimistic life = high wall / low corrosion
trace.notes: Screening uncertainty band for limited or conflicting wall evidence.

assumptions.notes: Project contingency factor

warnings.message: No NETL CO2_T_COM reference total is supplied for this scenario, so cost is internally checked but not externally validated.

trace.name: cost_subtotal
trace.formula: sum(material, labor, ROW damages, misc, surge tank, control system, booster station)

trace.name: contingency
trace.formula: contingency_fraction * cost_subtotal_usd_2025

trace.name: total_cost
trace.formula: cost_subtotal_usd_2025 + cost_contingency_usd_2025

trace.name: netl_cost_comparison
trace.formula: cost_total_usd_2025 - netl_reference_total_capex_usd_2025
trace.notes: Runs only when a like-for-like NETL CO2_T_COM reference is supplied.

warnings.message: Repurposing gate is a screening/requalification checklist. It is not final engineering approval.

Repurposing evidence gaps: inner_diameter_in quality is assumed_or_standard; target_co2_phase quality is assumed; co2_water_content_ppmv quality is assumed; co2_water_spec_limit_ppmv quality is assumed; water_dew_point_margin_c quality is assumed; co2_composition_known is no; material_certificates_available is unknown; fracture_toughness_basis quality is assumed; ili_mfl_available is unknown; component_compatibility_screened is no.

trace.name: repurposing_phase_screen
trace.formula: use target_co2_phase when stated; otherwise compare average pressure with CO2 critical pressure as a screening flag
trace.notes: Screening logic only; detailed phase behaviour needs validated EOS/mixture modelling. Cites REF_OSTBY_TORBERGSEN_RONEID_LEINUM_2022_CO2_REQUALIFICATION and REF_TORBERGSEN_LEINUM_RONEID_2025_GAS_PHASE_CO2_REQUALIFICATION.

trace.name: repurposing_evidence_score
trace.formula: start at 100; subtract weighted penalties for missing, assumed, unknown or weak requalification evidence
trace.notes: Cites REF_BURKINSHAW_GALLON_CARVELL_HUSSAIN_2024_HYDROGEN_DATA_EVIDENCE for data confidence discipline.

trace.name: repurposing_work_scope
trace.formula: convert evidence gaps and CO2-service risks into named work items for cost and LCA
trace.notes: Cites REF_KUMAR_LOWERY_PASSUCCI_2025_ENI_LIVERPOOL_BAY_IMR, REF_DALONZO_BUSCO_ELVIRA_CHERUBINI_2025_CO2_IMR, REF_YUSOF_AZIZ_2025_PETRONAS_DENSE_PHASE_CO2_REPURPOSING and REF_KASS_ET_AL_2023_MATERIAL_COMPATIBILITY.

warnings.message: Refurbishment work-scope quantities are screening drivers. They are not contractor method statements, vendor quotes, or final LCA factors.

trace.name: gate_items_to_work_scope_rows
trace.formula: map repurposing_work_scope_items to quantity drivers; add replacement steel and aggregate refurbishment activity package
trace.notes: Rows cite requalification, IMR, dense-phase, data quality and material compatibility source IDs. They are designed to feed cost and LCA modules.

outputs.name: pre_lca_decision
outputs.value: marginal

outputs.name: pre_lca_confidence
outputs.value: medium

outputs.name: pre_lca_reason_summary
outputs.value: Move to LCA only as a sensitivity case until assumptions are checked.

outputs.name: pre_lca_reasons
outputs.value: Capacity passes: 9.97 MtCO2/year versus 5.88 MtCO2/year required.; Integrity passes at screening level: 24.55 years remaining life and 4.91 mm available wall.; Cost screen is positive: benchmark avoided new-build CAPEX is $228,500,811.; Some important values are assumed or sensitivity inputs: capacity_factor, co2_composition_known, co2_water_content_ppmv, co2_water_spec_limit_ppmv, component_compatibility_screened, contingency_fraction, fracture_toughness_basis, future_co2_corrosion_rate_high_mm_per_year, future_co2_corrosion_rate_low_mm_per_year, future_co2_corrosion_rate_mm_per_year, historical_wall_loss_uncertainty_fraction, ili_mfl_available, inner_diameter_in, material_certificates_available, minimum_wall_thickness_uncertainty_fraction, nominal_wall_thickness_uncertainty_fraction, section_replacement_fraction, target_co2_phase, water_dew_point_margin_c.; Upstream modules still contain validation warnings.; Repurposing gate is marginal: Promising only as a screening case, but important evidence is missing..

outputs.name: pre_lca_next_data
outputs.value: verify wall thickness and inspection records; validate CO2 density, viscosity, compressibility, and phase behaviour; complete the repurposing gate evidence checklist; compare cost with NETL CO2_T_COM or another external benchmark; define itemised reuse modification cost before detailed LCA

warnings.message: Pipeline is technically promising, but should not move to detailed LCA without checking key assumptions.

trace.name: pre_lca_gate
trace.formula: fail if any upstream module fails; insufficient_data if key outputs are missing; marginal if outputs pass but key assumptions, repurposing-gate gaps, or validation warnings remain; otherwise pass
trace.notes: This is a screening gate, not an engineering approval decision.

trace.name: pipeline_steel_mass
trace.formula: pi * (OD^2 - ID^2) / 4 * length * steel_density

trace.name: lca_proxy
trace.formula: new-build proxy = steel mass * steel factor + length * construction factor; reuse proxy = refurbishment steel * steel factor + length * refurbishment factor
trace.notes: Screening proxy to be replaced by Brightway/openLCA ecoinvent calculation. The refurbishment fraction may be increased by the repurposing gate when evidence gaps suggest additional validation or replacement work.
